name: Saffaullah Shuvo
title: Saffaullah Shuvo — Software Engineer
tagline: Who thinks in systems and draws in code.
description: Software engineer with an applied-mathematics background, building AI-first web products end-to-end — React, Next.js, and TypeScript on the frontend, Node.js and Go on the backend, MongoDB and PostgreSQL for data, with AI-driven workflows throughout. From CMS platforms to canvas rendering engines.
